reference.title: Glossary
reference.shortdesc: Small glossary to test dl/dt/dd rendering and filtering behavior.

dlentry.dd: Using attributes like audience and a DITAVAL file to exclude or include content for different readers.
Using platform to publish different outputs for web, print, or device targets.
Publishing strategy that splits content into multiple HTML files based on map rules.

section.title: Web-only term
section.p: This section appears only in the WEB variant build.

section.title: Print-only term
section.p: This section appears only in the PRINT variant build.
